title: Baby Terry Towelling Nappies, Absorbent and Reusable Cloth Diapers, 100% Soft Cotton Washable Nappies, 60cms (Unisex)
features: Bright Bots 6 pack 100% cotton terry squares 60cms - thick and thirsty
This 6 Pack is available in unisex, blue or pink combinations
Fantastic as an economical reusable nappy for babies, but with many other uses such as small towel, burp cloth, changing mat cover
HIGH QUALITY Terry Squares made ethically in Pakistan to Oeko Tex 100 Standard
MACHINE WASHABLE 40c up to 60c - do NOT bleach, suitable to tumble fry. Prewash before use
description: Product Description Pure Cotton Terry Squares Bright Bots Terry Squares are made from 100% cotton and are super absorbent and reusable nappies Multi Purpose Baby Essential Bright Bots Terry Squares are super soft and are incredibly useful for a newborn baby. Use as a nappy, kitchen towel, duster or even as a car polisher. Bright Bots Terry Squares in Bright Colour Options Add some colour with our wide selection of coloured terry squares. From orange to pink, purple to turquoise, we've got you covered. Easy to Wash Terry Nappies Bright Bots Terry Squares can be washed at up to 40°C and dry in no time at all. Prewash before use to prepare them. Excellent Quality Terry Squares Bright Bots newborn terry nappies are a generous 60cm. Made from 100% soft cotton, they are absorbent, breathable and will still look good after many washes. Explore our wider range of cotton products We have a wide range of cotton squares and nappies for you to explore Bright Bots Muslin Squares Bright Bots Terry Towelling Squares (6 Pack) Bright Bots Terry Towelling Squares (12 Pack) Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 698 4.8 out of 5 stars 9 4.7 out of 5 stars 107 Price £13.99 £ 13 . 99 £14.99 £ 14 . 99 £24.95 £ 24 . 95 Product type Muslin Squares Terry Towelling Squares (6 Pack) Terry Towelling Squares (12 Pack) Machine Washable ✓ ✓ ✓

product_details_tab_data.Title: Bright Bots Baby Terry Towelling Nappies, Absorbent and Reusable Cloth Diapers, 100% Soft Cotton Washable Nappies, 60cms (Unisex)
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Baby Products › Nappy Changing › Cloth Nappies & Accessories › Cloth Nappies
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: Please always check that your baby supports the terry cloth diaper well and that there is no risk of irritation or allergy. Textiles, especially those in contact with sensitive skin, can cause reactions. Be sure to dispose of used products responsibly.
